message:
feat(frankenterm-core): add DECALN (ESC#8) and REP (CSI b) parser support (bd-lff4p.1.13)

Add ScreenAlignment and RepeatChar(u16) action variants. Introduce
EscHash parser state for ESC # intermediate sequences. Wire DECALN
to fill grid with 'E' + reset cursor, and REP to repeat last printed
character. Add 4 parser unit tests and 3 conformance fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "decaln_fill_with_e",
+  "description": "DECALN (ESC # 8) fills the entire screen with 'E' and moves cursor to origin",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b2338",
+  "comment": "Print AB at (0,0)-(0,1), then DECALN fills all 5x3 cells with 'E', cursor moves to (0,0)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_nowrap",
+  "description": "With DECAWM disabled, printing at right margin overwrites last col without wrapping",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b3f376c4142434445464748",
+  "comment": "CSI ? 7 l (DECAWM off) then print ABCDEFGH; E fills col 4, F/G/H overwrite col 4; cursor stays at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "H" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_reenable",
+  "description": "Disabling then re-enabling DECAWM restores wrap behavior",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b3f376c414243441b5b3f37684546474849",
+  "comment": "CSI ? 7 l (off), print ABCD at cols 0-3, cursor at col 4; CSI ? 7 h (on), print E at col 4 (sets pending_wrap), F wraps to (1,0), FGHI fill cols 0-3; cursor at (1,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "G" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": "H" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 3, "char": "I" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_insert_mode",
+  "description": "IRM (insert mode) shifts chars right when printing instead of overwriting",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243441b5b481b5b346858",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD, CUP(1,1) home, IRM on (CSI 4 h), print X; X inserts at col 0, shifts ABCD right -> XABCD; cursor at (0,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "lnm_newline_mode",
+  "description": "LNM (mode 20) causes LF to also perform CR, so cursor returns to col 0",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b32306841424344450a464748",
+  "comment": "CSI 20 h (LNM on), print ABCDE at (0,0)-(0,4), LF; with LNM the LF also does CR so cursor goes to (1,0), print FGH at (1,0)-(1,2); cursor at (1,3)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 3 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "G" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": "H" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "rep_basic",
+  "description": "REP (CSI 3 b) repeats the last printed character 3 more times",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3362",
+  "comment": "Print A at (0,0), REP(3) prints A at cols 1, 2, 3. Cursor at (0,4).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "A" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "rep_last_char_only",
+  "description": "REP repeats only the most recently printed character, not earlier ones",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b5b3262",
+  "comment": "Print A at (0,0) then B at (0,1). REP(2) repeats B at cols 2,3. Result: ABBB. Cursor at (0,4).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "B" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
